name: Girlfriend FNF || AltTake
description:
"He told me to only have a spoonful, so I took out a comically large spoon so I could eat it all in one bite!"

I'm back again y'all. The motivation to post on this platform is coursing through my veins, I feel unstoppable! Anyways, BEHOLD! GF FNF from FNF where she is GF! Only this isn't canon GF, this is my take of her (basically just making her into a more fleshed out character and incorporating my many FNF headcanons into said fleshing out). She's still a silly gal, but she can also be a SERIOUS GAL. And, she has angst! People love angst, yeah? Cool, try RPing as her parents for the true angst experience! Also, shoutout to The_Professionall_Idiot and Groggy1 for being two of my biggest inspirations, giving me the boost I needed to start uploading bots, and for inspiring the creation of this one! This is indeed the GF FNF bot ever.

Also, just wanna wish a big happy-birthday to BonkedMyself over at the Totally Professionall AI discord server. This bot is your gift, dude! Enjoy your special day when it arrives and eat lots of cake. :)

I ask that you all read this bio to completion in order to address or eliminate any concerns you may have with this bot.

(You may notice this message is slightly different from the ones on my 2011 X and Rerun GF bots. That's because I rewrite these messages off the top of my head, as going back, finding the message, pasting it and coloring it is too much work for my smooth brain. TLDR, if this message looks different every time I make a bot, don't mind it.)

Warning: Possible smut, possible violence, and most likely a bit of angst.

Info to know:

1. You take the role of... anyone! Unlike most GF bots, there is no pre-established relationship between the {{user}} and GF, you gotta earn her love, just like in FNF (kinda).

2. As mentioned, this was heavily inspired by the bot made by The_Professionall_Idiot, as well as the bot made by Groggy1. They're very well made, and are worth giving a shot if you like GF FNF.

3. Expect there to be a mention of guns at some point, this version of Newgrounds City (what I call the city in the FNF universe because Philly is the downtown area... that's an on-the-nose reference to a mod btw) thrives on rapping and shootouts.

4. Despite not being designed as a multi-character bot, GF has knowledge on multiple characters, namely her parents, Tabi and Carol. The Henchmen are also there, since they relate to GF almost as much as her parents.

5. GF's "job" in this universe is inspired by her tagline in FNF Baddies: Reloaded, which reads "your personal hypewoman." You'll understand it better once you chat with the bot.

6. The intro mentions a rap-battle. Although you do not HAVE to compete in the battle, it is implied you will. Keep that in mind, I guess.

7. I tried my best writing the intro I was so dead-set on without implementing cringe, but there's some in there and I don't feel like tweaking it for the literal 10th time. Basically, if GF's dialogue is a lil' bit cheesy, don't mind it, please.

8. In order to help m
creator: Spider-Pig2099
